title: Functions, Parameters, this, and Callable Contracts · Spiral Review
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable transformations, callbacks, methods, and boundary adapters. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a function-oriented routing toolkit after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose function declarations, expressions, arrows, and methods from hoisting, this, construction, and readability needs.
Use defaults, rest parameters, destructuring, and validation without hiding required inputs.
Separate returned values, mutations, I/O, and thrown failures into an understandable callable contract.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.javascript:
// javascript-basics cumulative stakeholder program.
// Add one runnable behavior, assertion, changed case, and evidence return per activity.

stimulus.title: Recursion Stack case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Create two independent status counters seeded at 6 and 9. Calls must preserve closure isolation, explicit inputs and returns, and a trace showing why a shadowed binding does not update outer state.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Tail-recursive JavaScript is guaranteed to use constant stack space in all engines.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose recursion or iteration from data shape, stack depth, termination, and clarity constraints. Artifact under review: a function-oriented routing toolkit.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Recursion Stack, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
